seoTitle: Ashby Heights vs Ashby Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ashby Heights and Ashby Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ashby Heights vs Ashby Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ashby Heights and Ashby Island.
heading: Ashby Heights vs Ashby Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ashby Heights, New South Wales and Ashby Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ashby Island has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Ashby Heights (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ashby Heights or Ashby Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ashby Heights has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Ashby Island scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ashby Heights scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Ashby Island scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ashby Heights or Ashby Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ashby Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
